summary: Classified the mixed PR inventory shard without inventing a shared canonical. No GitHub mutations, merge recommendations, closures, or fix artifacts are planned because instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise-pr lanes are disabled for this run. Open PRs with unresolved maintainer or technical judgment are scoped to per-item needs_human actions; closed seed PRs are kept closed; the linked security-sensitive PR is quarantined only for that exact ref.
